title: CISA Warns of Critical Fortinet FortiOS RCE Vulnerability
desc: CISA has added CVE-2026-12345 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog after active exploitation was confirmed in the wild.
author: CISA
content_html:
Overview

CISA has added CVE-2026-12345 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. This critical vulnerability affects Fortinet FortiOS versions 7.2.x through 7.4.x and allows unauthenticated remote code execution.

Impact

An unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code on affected FortiGate devices by sending crafted HTTP requests to the SSL-VPN interface. This could lead to full device compromise, network lateral movement, and data exfiltration.

Mitigation

  • Update to FortiOS 7.4.5 or later immediately
  • If patching is not possible, disable SSL-VPN functionality
  • Monitor logs for indicators of compromise
  • Apply network segmentation to limit exposure

References

See FortiGuard advisory FG-IR-26-001 for full details.
